title: ErrorGetter
description: A plugin which gets all of your errors and puts em in a file
body:
**ErrorGetter: Server Log Error Management Made Simple**

ErrorGetter is a powerful and lightweight Minecraft server plugin designed to streamline error tracking and management. By automatically extracting errors from your server logs and compiling them into organized, readable reports, it helps server administrators quickly identify and resolve issues without digging through massive log files.

**Key Features**

**Intelligent Error Extraction**

Automatically scans server logs for ERROR, FATAL, and WARNING entries

Customizable filtering options to include or exclude specific error types

Creates neatly formatted reports for easy review

**Flexible Configuration**

Set automatic scanning intervals (disable or schedule as needed)

Customize date/time formats for organized report archives

Configure message formatting and colors

**Simple Command Interface**

/errorgetter scan - Manually trigger a log scan

/errorgetter list - View all generated error reports

/errorgetter reload - Reload configuration without server restart

Permission-Based Access Control

Fine-grained permissions system to control who can access different features

Safe for use on multiplayer servers with diverse staff roles

**Why Choose This Plugin?**

Many server administrators struggle with locating critical errors buried in extensive log files.

This plugin eliminates that frustration by automatically extracting and organizing errors into dedicated, searchable files. Rather than spending valuable time sifting through thousands of log entries, you can focus on what matters—resolving the issues and improving your server.

The plugin runs efficiently in the background with minimal performance impact, using asynchronous operations to ensure your server's performance remains unaffected even during scans. Its intuitive command structure and comprehensive configuration options make it accessible for both novice and experienced administrators.

**Perfect For**

Server administrators managing multiple Minecraft servers

Development environments where tracking errors is critical

Community servers where staff need organized error reports

Any server where rapid issue identification and resolution is important

ErrorGetter transforms the chaotic world of server logs into actionable intelligence, helping you maintain a smoother, more reliable Minecraft server experience for your players.
